Sabin Ghimire
Graduate Teaching Assistant at SIUE | MS in Computer Science |
Full Stack Developer | JavaScript Instructor
Maryville, Illinois, United States
Summary
Graduate student in Computer Science at SIUE, with experience
as a Technical Team Lead and strong skills in full-stack web
development. Skilled in modern web development frameworks
with a background in Computer Engineering from Kathmandu
University (KU). Passionate team player, focused on building
scalable applications and growing as a full-stack engineer.
Experience
Southern Illinois University Edwardsville
Graduate Teaching Assistant
January 2026 - Present (3 months)
Maryville, Illinois, United States
Freelance
Full Stack Engineer
June 2024 - June 2025 (1 year 1 month)
Lalitpur District
Developed a boutique store webpage using React, Node.js, Express, and
PostgreSQL, implementing responsive UI, dynamic product management, and
RESTful APIs.
Built a portfolio management system prototype to assist users trading on the
Nepal Stock Exchange (NEPSE), leveraging React, Node.js, Chart.js, and API
integrations for real-time portfolio tracking and data visualization.
Created an Animal Finder application with React, Express, and external APIs,
implementing asynchronous state management, search/filter functionality, and
optimized performance.
InfoDevelopers Pvt. Ltd.
5 years
Team Lead
 
Page 1 of 4

May 2023 - May 2024 (1 year 1 month)
Lalitpur District
Orchestrated the merger of three departments into a 40-member Frontend
Department, ensuring smooth knowledge transfer and collaboration.
Researched and implemented micro frontends and mono-repo approaches for
large-scale project efficiency.
Led frontend architecture and code standards for the Core Banking System,
including POCs for optimal technologies.
Improved React code quality and coverage using Vitest c8 and React Testing
Library.
Directed development of the Central Performance Appraisal System for the
Ministry of Home Affairs, Nepal, enhancing performance evaluation of District
Administration Offices.
Associate Team Lead
December 2021 - May 2023 (1 year 6 months)
Lalitpur District
Led design and development of the Employee Evaluation System at
InfoDevelopers, managing an 8-member dev team from conception to delivery.
Organized the Winter Intake Code Camp, fostering learning and skill
development.
Optimized workflows by implementing GitLab pipelines, coding standards, and
modern practices with React Query and React Hook Form.
Achieved Registered Scrum Master Certification and applied agile
methodologies for effective project management.
Conducted knowledge-sharing sessions and exploratory research on frontend
technologies to drive team growth and innovation.
Senior Software Engineer
July 2021 - November 2021 (5 months)
Lalitpur District
Built the Digital Lending System at Rapi Money and integrated services like
Digio (KYC, e-sign, e-mandates) and Finbit (bank verification).
 
Page 2 of 4

Led a 7-member React team to develop the Nepal Audit Management System
(NAMS) for the Auditor General of Nepal.
Directed frontend for an Online Banking Portal, integrating with Infinity (Core
Banking Solution) for seamless KYC and account opening.
Enhanced performance and security by adopting React Table, Keycloak
(SSO), and Socket.IO for real-time features.
Software Engineer
July 2020 - June 2021 (1 year)
Lalitpur District
Built the Advertisement Management System for the Advertisement Board of
Nepal and contributed to Smart MIS for project tracking and collaboration.
Enhanced projects with Kanban boards, WYSIWYG editors, Chart.js, and
React codebase refactoring to improve scalability and maintainability.
Introduced TypeScript in React and delivered a JavaScript training program for
cross-functional teams.
Junior Software Engineer
October 2019 - July 2020 (10 months)
Lalitpur District
Developed the Weapon Inventory Management System for Nepal Police,
streamlining inventory tracking.
Improved the Online Police Clearance Report (OPCR) system with new
features and updates.
Created a data visualization module for NTIP using Highcharts and jQuery to
make trade data more accessible.
Trainee Developer
July 2019 - October 2019 (4 months)
Lalitpur District
Contributed to real-world projects under Team Lead supervision.
Produced clear, structured project documentation.
 
Page 3 of 4

Developed a sample social network app with JavaScript and React.
Internship
June 2019 - July 2019 (2 months)
Lalitpur District
Mastered advanced JavaScript and React through intensive coursework.
Compiled an internship report highlighting key learnings and outcomes.
IT Training Nepal
Course Instructor
August 2022 - April 2023 (9 months)
Kathmandu
Developed a standard Node Js training program.
Delivered 30hrs of web development training to 30+ participants.
Developed comprehensive web development program focused on React Js.
Education
Southern Illinois University Edwardsville
Master of Science - MS, Computer Science · (August 2025)
Kathmandu University (KU)
Bachelors, Computer Engineering · (August 2015 - December 2019)
